channel.title: Networking Certifications on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in Networking Certifications on simeononsecurity

item.title: Cisco Networking Certifications: CCNA, CCNP, and CCIE Guide 2026
item.category: "Cisco certifications" , "CCNA" , "CCNP" , "CCIE" , "Cisco CCNA 200-301" , "Cisco certification path" , "networking certifications" , "network engineer certifications" , "Cisco career path 2026"
item.description: A complete guide to Cisco certification tracks in 2026 — CCNA, CCNP, and CCIE — with what each covers, recommended study resources, and how Cisco certs map to IT career paths.

item.title: Information Technology Career Playbook: From Help Desk to IT Director
item.category: "IT career" , "information technology" , "career playbook" , "IT certifications" , "technology jobs" , "career guidance" , "professional development"
item.description: A comprehensive guide to launching, growing, and advancing your Information Technology career. Covers IT specializations, certifications, job search strategies, salaries, and team leadership.
